name: International Business Machines Corporation
overview_text: IBM is a multinational technology and consulting firm headquartered in New York City. It was founded in 1911 and is considered one of the largest IT companies in the world, providing innovative solutions for businesses.
office_locations: [{'location': 'New York', 'address': '1 New Orchard Road, Armonk, New York, 10504'}, {'location': 'Chicago', 'address': '333 N. Michigan Ave., Chicago, IL 60601'}, {'location': 'Austin', 'address': '1 IBM Plaza, Austin, TX 78701'}]

description: IBM is a multinational technology and consulting firm headquartered in New York City. It was founded in 1911 and is considered one of the largest IT companies in the world, providing innovative solutions for businesses.
vision_statement: To bring the best computing systems and solutions to the world for business and society.
mission_statement: To lead in the invention, development and manufacture of the systems, applications and technologies that matter most.
sales_motion: IBM's sales motion is focused on providing end-to-end solutions that integrate AI, cloud, and hybrid IT to help clients navigate their digital transformation.
exit_strategy_history: IBM sold its PC division to Lenovo in 2005
IBM sold its semiconductor business to GlobalFoundries in 2015
ethical_sourcing: IBM has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure responsible supply chain practices.
benchmark_vs_peers: IBM's revenue growth has been below the industry average over the past 5 years.
case_studies: IBM helped a major bank reduce its energy consumption by 30% through the use of AI-powered energy management systems
IBM worked with a leading retailer to implement a cloud-based supply chain management system that increased efficiency by 25%
sustainability_csr: IBM has set a goal to be carbon neutral by 2030 and has implemented various initiatives to reduce its environmental impact.
crisis_behavior: IBM has a strong track record of responding effectively to crises, including a major data breach in 2019.
